chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 190 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2024 Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abro, Assistant Advocate General >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioner. Learned AAG Sindh undertakes that in due course after completing codal formalities the boundary wall around graveyard Noor Shah Bukhari would be constructed in accordance with law. This petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
